zh.lifeSummary: 當Baudoin des Roches於大約1140年出生在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥延時，他的父親Herbert des Roches31歲，母親Agnes42歲。他於1164年1月15日與Unknown在法國努維勒-阿吉泰維安結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1199年在法國安喬被列為capetian seneschals of anjou。他去世於1191年在法國o-阿爾培斯易瑟艾安喬享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Baudoin des Roches于大约1140年出生在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥延时，他的父亲Herbert des Roches31岁，母亲Agnes42岁。他于1164年1月15日与Unknown在法国努維勒-阿吉泰維安结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1199年在法国安喬被列为capetian seneschals of anjou。他去世于1191年在法国o-阿爾培斯易瑟艾安喬享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: des
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French (Alsace and Lorraine): from a shortened form of the German personal name   Debus  .

variants.name: Debus
meanings: German: from a personal name, a vernacular short form of Matthäus (see Matthew ). This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine); compare Debs .
French: habitational name, with fused preposition de ‘from’, for someone from any of various places called Bus (from a regional form of bois ‘wood’) in Eure, Pas-de-Calais, and Somme.

nameMeanings.name: Roches
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1  Norman, English: locative name from Les Roches in Seine-Maritime (Normandy). In 1297 John de Roches held the manor of (East) Winterslow in Wilts (later known as Roche Court). Any of the following post-medieval bearers may alternatively belong under (2).  See also  Roche  .
2 English: variant of Roche with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Roche
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Aidan, Declan, Eamonn, Fergus, Fionnuala, Kevin Patrick, Liam.
Irish (Munster) and English (of Norman origin): variant of   Roach  . Compare   Roch  .

French: topographic name for someone who lived by a rocky outcrop or crag, from Old French roche ‘rock’. In North America, this surname is also a shortened form of the variant Laroche 2. Compare Deroche .

nameMeanings.name: Baudoin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Baudoin des Roches was born about 1140, in Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France, his father, Herbert des Roches, was 31 and his mother, Agnes, was 42. He married Unknown on 15 January 1164, in Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. In 1199, his occupation is listed as capetian seneschals of anjou in Anjou, France. He died in 1191, in Anjou, Isère, Rhône-Alpes, France, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Baudoin des Roches est né environ 1140, à Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France, son père, Herbert des Roches, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Agnes, avait 42 ans. Il a épousé Unknown le 15 janvier 1164, à Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. En 1199, sa profession de son indiquée est capetian seneschals of anjou à Anjou, France. Il est décédé en 1191, à Anjou, Isère, Rhône-Alpes, France, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Baudoin des Roches um 1140 in Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Herbert des Roches 31 und seine Mutter Agnes 42. Er hat am 15. Januar 1164 in Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich Unknown geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1199 ist sein Beruf als capetian seneschals of anjou in Anjou, Frankreich aufgeführt. Er starb 1191 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Anjou, Isère, Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Baudoin des Roches è nato il circa 1140 nel Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Francia, il suo padre, Herbert des Roches, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Agnes, aveva 42 anni. Lui sposato Unknown il 15 gennaio 1164, nel Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Nel 1199, la sua occupazione è indicata come capetian seneschals of anjou nel Anjou, Francia. Morì nel 1191, nel Anjou, Isère, Rhône-Alpes, Francia, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Baudoin des Rochesが約1140年にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーメイエンで生まれた時，父Herbert des Rochesは31歳，母Agnesは42歳であった。1164年1月15日にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインヴィエンでUnknownと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。1199年，フランスアンジョウでの職業はcapetian seneschals of anjouと記録されている。彼は1191年にフランスルhoネ-アルペスイスeアアンジョウで52歳で死去した。

ko.Longué-Jumelles,49180,Maine-et-Loire,Pay: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 론구e-j레스

ko.lifeSummary: Baudoin des Roches(이)가 대략 1140년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 메이니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Herbert des Roches(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes(은)는 42세였다. 그는 1164년 1월 15일 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 비니에서 Unknown(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1199년, 그의 직업은 프랑스 앤조우에서 capetian seneschals of anjou이었다. 그는 1191년 프랑스 ho니-알프스 이스e르 앤조우에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Baudoin des Roches nasceu aproximadamente 1140, em Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, França, seu pai, Herbert des Roches, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Agnes, tinha 42 anos. Ele casou-se com Unknown em 15 de janeiro de 1164, em Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Em 1199, sua profissão aparece como capetian seneschals of anjou em Anjou, França. Ele faleceu em 1191, em Anjou, Isère, Rhône-Alpes, França, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Baudoin des Roches родился около 1140 г. в местности меиенн, пеис де ла лоир, Франция, его отцу по имени Herbert des Roches было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Agnes, 42. Он женился на женщине по имени Unknown 15 января 1164 г. в местности виенн, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. В 1199 году он работал по профессии capetian seneschals of anjou в местности анджоу, Франция. Он умер в 1191 г. в местности анджоу, исeр, рoне-алпесь, Франция в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Baudoin des Roches nació aproximadamente 1140, en Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Francia, su papá, Herbert des Roches, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Agnes, tenía 42 años. Se casó con Unknown el 15 de enero de 1164, en Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. En 1199, su ocupación registrada era capetian seneschals of anjou en Anjou, Francia. Murió en 1191, en Anjou, Isère, Rhône-Alpes, Francia, a la edad de 52 años.
